description_long: This is a large, rectangular advertising board mounted on a sturdy vertical pole with a wide base for stability. The main display surface is bordered by a thick, dark frame with visible bolts or rivets along the top edge, giving it an industrial look. The front face features a light-colored panel with the text 'YOUR AD HERE' printed in bold, black letters, indicating space for customizable advertisements. Below the display, there are two prominent spotlights attached to a horizontal support bar, designed to illuminate the advertisement at night or in low-light conditions. The rear of the board reveals a robust support structure, including a metal grid platform and additional mounting hardware. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, pole-mounted advertising board with a light display panel, dark industrial frame, and attached spotlights for illumination.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display panel with 'YOUR AD HERE' text and two spotlights beneath.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the thick frame, metal grid platform, and mounting hardware.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with clear visibility of the display panel and supporting pole.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the depth of the frame, grid platform, and spotlights' mounting.
attribute_frame_design: thick metal frame with visible bolts and industrial styling
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed panel with placeholder text 'YOUR AD HERE'
